summary: Documentation fix: updated pip install example in docs/reference/container-images.md to use the combined PEP 508 extras form ("/tmp/keystone[ldap,memcache_pool,oauth1]") matching the actual images/keystone/Dockerfile implementation. Planwerk metadata files added to record the external review feedback and capture a review pattern for cross-referencing documentation examples against implementation.

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
Change is scoped to the reviewer feedback
